'''Jynne Celwik''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Waiter/Legends|waitress]] at the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] prior to the [[Clone Wars|Clone Wars]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], she was working in the club the [[Local day/Legends|night]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] ran into the club to hide from [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker|Anakin Skywalker]].

==Biography==
Jynne Celwik was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] employed as a [[Waiter/Legends|waitress]] at the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]],<ref name="jc" /> a [[Nightclub/Legends|nightclub]] and [[gambling]] hall in the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] of<ref name="CSWE2">{{CSWECite|II|431|Outlander Club}}</ref> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TVD">''[[Star Wars: Attack of the Clones: The Visual Dictionary]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="CSWE2" /> She worked at the club just prior to the start of [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]<ref name="jc" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> Celwik was working at the club the [[Local day/Legends|night]] of the [[Plot to assassinate Senator Amidala/Legends|attempted assassination]] on [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]],<ref name="EP2" /> roaming the floor in search big tippers and thirsty patrons.<ref name="Tip">{{SWArchive|url=episode-ii/imageattack/2003/04/imageattack20030415.html|series=Image Attack|text=Tip Your Waitresses}}</ref>

The assassin, [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]], ran into the club to hide while being chased by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]. Just as the Jedi entered the club, she serviced a table. The waitress made rounds through the club as Skywalker surveyed the crowd. She poured a drink for a patron moments before Kenobi disarmed Wesell at the bar of the club with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. While patrons of the club had their attention drawn to the altercation, Celwik did not turn to look and walked away from the table.<ref name="EP2" />

==Personality and traits==
Celwik had [[Color/Legends|blonde]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and light skin.<ref name="jc" /> Her look while working at the club was considered attractive, yet unpretentious, unlike the patrons she served.<ref name=Who'sWho">{{InsiderCite|75|Who's Who in the Outlander Club: It's Ladies' Night}}</ref>

==Equipment==
Celwik wore a black [[Clothing/Legends|dress]] and thigh-high black [[Boot/Legends|boots]] while working at the Outlander. She carried around a white tray.<ref name="EP2" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jynne Celwik first appeared in the [[2002]] [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']]. The Outlander Club scenes including Celwik,<ref name="EP2">{{Film|II}}</ref> who was portrayed by uncredited model [[Kristen Bronson]],<ref name="Bronson">{{WebCite|url=https://kristenbronson.com/artwork/3258696-Star-Wars-Episode-2.html|text=Kristen/ Bronson|archivedate=20250316184213}}</ref> were shot at [[Fox Studios, Sydney]] on [[July 17]], [[2000]].<ref name="Mythmaking">''[[Mythmaking: Behind the Scenes of Attack of the Clones]]''</ref> The character was first identified on [[April 15]], [[2003]] through the [[StarWars.com]] [[Image Attack]] feature.<ref name="Tip" />
